evidence.snippet:
The revolutionary series of Reliable, Powerful and Silent
subsea thrusters

#### Redefining subsea solutions with innovative, reliable, and durable thrusters
designed for the toughest underwater environments.

items.notes: Rim-driven electric subsea thrusters are the founding product and core business — sold to third-party ROV/AUV builders globally.

evidence.snippet:
Building on years of thruster innovation, Copenhagen Subsea develops the Gorilla ROV.
Classified as a Light Work Class ROV, the Gorilla is built for agility, strength, and high maneuverability. Powered by Copenhagen Subsea’s own electric thrusters, it delivers a compact, silent, and highly responsive subsea vehicle.

items.notes: Gorilla ROV is a complete Light Work Class ROV; SeaBadger hull-cleaning ROV co-developed with sister company; Maneuvering Subsea System is a complete subsea positioning vehicle.

products_categories.notes: Medium list confidence because subsea-thrusters and ROV product pages were skipped; specific thruster model numbers/variants not yet confirmed.

evidence.snippet: Calculate the thrust needed for your ROV, AUV, or underwater system.

Today, our thrusters are trusted globally, from deep-sea research to offshore energy projects. “We don’t compete on price. But when it comes to reliability, we are the ones to go to,” says co-founder Jens Peter Bredholdt.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Primary business is selling rim-driven electric thrusters as components to ROV/AUV builders worldwide. The company also manufactures complete ROV platforms (Gorilla ROV, SeaBadger) but the founding mission and dominant product line is the thruster itself.

items.name: Subsea Thrusters
items.product_type: rim-driven electric subsea thrusters for ROVs/AUVs

evidence.snippet: Building on years of thruster innovation, Copenhagen Subsea develops the Gorilla ROV.

items.name: SeaBadger
items.product_type: hull-cleaning ROV (co-developed with Hydro Hull Cleaning)

evidence.snippet:
The SeaBadger MKI launches as a specialized hull-cleaning ROV, co-developed with our sister company, Hydro Hull Cleaning.
Built around Copenhagen Subsea’s electric thrusters, the SeaBadger was engineered for diver-free operation, industrial durability, and safe performance under water.

items.notes: MKI (2015) and MKII (2022) versions; co-developed with sister company Hydro Hull Cleaning.

products.notes: Specific thruster model names/SKUs likely appear on the /subsea-thrusters page which was skipped.

evidence.snippet:
**A Global Impact**
Copenhagen Subsea’s electric thrusters proved their worth globally, operating silently at depths of up to 3 kilometers and running for over 4,000 hours nonstop.

Our thrusters are running continuously and have already exceeded 4,000 hours without breakdowns, and they keep going! Their performance and durability are rigorously tested and certified through in-water trials.

readiness.notes: Products in serial commercial use globally with documented multi-thousand-hour run times, published manuals, brochures, and spec sheets. Customers include US Navy, GEOMAR, and offshore energy companies.
